summary: The plan is implementation-ready and addresses the prior round’s accepted concern about provider placement. I only see minor non-blocking refinements.

issues.title: App layout path likely does redundant auth/user resolution
issues.description: Step 1 defines a no-arg `resolveUnitPreference()` path that calls `getCurrentUserId()`, and Step 6 calls it that way in `(app)/layout.tsx` even though `clerkId` is already available there. That implies avoidable extra auth/user lookup work in a hot layout path.
issues.suggestion: In `(app)/layout.tsx`, pass `clerkId` explicitly to `resolveUnitPreference(clerkId)` so the direct lookup path is used.

issues.title: `/share/[id]` is a misleading example of an unaffected route
issues.description: Verification #11 lists `/share/[id]` as unaffected because it does not use `AuthAwareShell`. In practice, that route redirects to `/kit/[id]`, and `/kit` is under `AuthAwareShell`, so the example can confuse QA expectations.
issues.suggestion: Revise #11 to reference only truly isolated routes (for example `/u/[userId]`) or explicitly note that `/share/[id]` is redirect-only and behavior is validated on `/kit/[id]`.
